root.description: The port number on which each of the nodes accepts connections. Defaults to `6379`
root.name: port

root.description: ARN of the KMS key used to encrypt the cluster at rest
root.name: kms_key_arn

root.description: Set of VPC Security Group ID-s to associate with this cluster
root.name: security_group_ids

root.description: The name of a snapshot from which to restore data into the new cluster
root.name: snapshot_name

root.description: List of ARN-s that uniquely identify RDB snapshot files stored in S3. The snapshot files will be used to populate the new cluster
root.name: snapshot_arns

root.description: The daily time range (in UTC) during which MemoryDB begins taking a daily snapshot of your shard. Example: `05:00-09:00`
root.name: snapshot_window

root.description: Mechanism that the cluster uses to discover IP addresses. Valid values are ipv4 and ipv6. Defaults to ipv4. To specify ipv6, network_type must be ipv6 or dual_stack
root.name: ip_discovery

root.description: Name of ACL to be created if `create_acl` is `true`, otherwise its the name of an existing ACL to use if `create_acl` is `false`
root.name: acl_name

root.description: Determines whether resources will be created - affects all resources
root.name: create

root.description: Cluster name - also default name used on all resources if more specific resource names are not provided
root.name: name

root.description: Determines whether `acl_name` is used as a prefix
root.name: acl_use_name_prefix

root.description: Determines whether `parameter_group_name` is used as a prefix
root.name: parameter_group_use_name_prefix

root.description: Description for the parameter group. Defaults to `Managed by Terraform`
root.name: parameter_group_description

root.description: A list of parameter maps to apply
root.name: parameter_group_parameters

root.description: Name of subnet group to be created if `create_subnet_group` is `true`, otherwise its the name of an existing subnet group to use if `create_subnet_group` is `false`
root.name: subnet_group_name

root.description: Determines whether `subnet_group_name` is used as a prefix
root.name: subnet_group_use_name_prefix

root.description: Determines whether to create users specified
root.name: create_users

root.description: A map of tags to use on all resources
root.name: tags

root.description: The number of shards in the cluster. Defaults to `1`
root.name: num_shards

root.description: The number of replicas to apply to each shard, up to a maximum of 5. Defaults to `1` (i.e. 2 nodes per shard)
root.name: num_replicas_per_shard

root.description: Specifies the weekly time range during which maintenance on the cluster is performed. It is specified as a range in the format `ddd:hh24:mi-ddd:hh24:mi`
root.name: maintenance_window

root.description: Additional tags for the parameter group created
root.name: parameter_group_tags

root.description: When set to `true`, the cluster will automatically receive minor engine version upgrades after launch. Defaults to `true`
root.name: auto_minor_version_upgrade

root.description: The compute and memory capacity of the nodes in the cluster. See AWS documentation on [supported node types](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/memorydb/latest/devguide/nodes.supportedtypes.html) as well as [vertical scaling](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/memorydb/latest/devguide/cluster-vertical-scaling.html)
root.name: node_type

root.description: A flag to enable in-transit encryption on the cluster. When set to `false`, the `acl_name` must be `open-access`. Defaults to `true`
root.name: tls_enabled

root.description: The number of days for which MemoryDB retains automatic snapshots before deleting them. When set to `0`, automatic backups are disabled. Defaults to `0`
root.name: snapshot_retention_limit

root.description: Must be set to `true` when using a data tiering node type
root.name: data_tiering

root.description: IP address type for the cluster. Valid values are ipv4, ipv6 and dual_stack. Defaults to ipv4
root.name: network_type

root.description: Name of parameter group to be created if `create_parameter_group` is `true`, otherwise its the name of an existing parameter group to use if `create_parameter_group` is `false`
root.name: parameter_group_name

root.description: Determines whether `name` is used as a prefix for the cluster
root.name: use_name_prefix

root.description: Set of VPC Subnet ID-s for the subnet group. At least one subnet must be provided
root.name: subnet_ids

root.description: The multi region cluster identifier if part of a multi region cluster
root.name: multi_region_cluster_name

root.description: List of externally created user names to associate with the ACL
root.name: acl_user_names

root.description: Determines whether to create parameter group specified
root.name: create_parameter_group

root.description: The engine version that the parameter group can be used with
root.name: parameter_group_family

root.description: Description for the subnet group. Defaults to `Managed by Terraform`
root.name: subnet_group_description

root.description: Additional tags for the subnet group created
root.name: subnet_group_tags

root.description: The engine that will run on your nodes. Supported values are `redis` and `valkey`
root.name: engine

root.description: ARN of the SNS topic to which cluster notifications are sent
root.name: sns_topic_arn

root.description: Name of the final cluster snapshot to be created when this resource is deleted. If omitted, no final snapshot will be made
root.name: final_snapshot_name

root.description: Determines whether to create ACL specified
root.name: create_acl

root.description: Region where this resource will be managed. Defaults to the Region set in the provider configuration
root.name: region

root.description: Description for the cluster. Defaults to `Managed by Terraform`
root.name: description

root.description: Version number of the engine to be used for the cluster. Downgrades are not supported
root.name: engine_version

root.description: A map of user definitions (maps) to be created
root.name: users
root.type:
map(object({
    user_name     = string
    access_string = string
    type          = optional(string, "password")
    passwords     = optional(list(string))
    tags          = optional(map(string), {})
  }))

root.description: Additional tags for the ACL created
root.name: acl_tags

root.description: Determines whether to create subnet group specified
root.name: create_subnet_group

root.description: Cluster name
root.name: cluster_id

root.description: Port number that the cluster configuration endpoint is listening on
root.name: cluster_endpoint_port

root.description: Set of shards in this cluster
root.name: cluster_shards

root.description: Map of attributes for the users created
root.name: users

root.description: Name of the ACL
root.name: acl_id

root.description: The minimum engine version supported by the ACL
root.name: acl_minimum_engine_version

root.description: The ARN of the parameter group
root.name: parameter_group_arn

root.description: ARN of the subnet group
root.name: subnet_group_arn

root.description: DNS hostname of the cluster configuration endpoint
root.name: cluster_endpoint_address

root.description: The ARN of the ACL
root.name: acl_arn

root.description: The ARN of the cluster
root.name: cluster_arn

root.description: Patch version number of the Redis engine used by the cluster
root.name: cluster_engine_patch_version

root.description: Name of the parameter group
root.name: parameter_group_id

root.description: Name of the subnet group
root.name: subnet_group_id

root.description: The VPC in which the subnet group exists
root.name: subnet_group_vpc_id
